title: Lophobios terracina
taxonomy: Lophobios terracina belongs to the family of aquatic plants known as Boryaceae. This plant is a type of aquatic fern that is native to the Mediterranean region. It is a vascular plant, belonging to the division Pteridophyta. Lophobios terracina is further classified into the genus Lophobios, which is a group of aquatic ferns. The classification of Lophobios terracina reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its aquatic environment.
